<?xml version="1.0"?>
<moleculizer-state>
  <model>
    <units-states>
      <modifications>
        <modification name="adp-bound">
          <weight-delta daltons="90"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="atp-bound">
          <weight-delta daltons="100"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="none">
          <weight-delta daltons="0"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="phosphorylated">
          <weight-delta daltons="10"/>
        </modification>
      </modifications>
      <mols>
        <mod-mol name="foo">
          <weight daltons="1000"/>
          <binding-site name="to-substrate">
            <default-shape-ref name="default"/>
            <site-shape name="default"/>
          </binding-site>
        </mod-mol>
        <mod-mol name="test-kinase">
          <weight daltons="2000"/>
          <mod-site name="atp-site">
            <default-mod-ref name="none"/>
          </mod-site>
        </mod-mol>
        <mod-mol name="test-substrate">
          <weight daltons="2000"/>
          <binding-site name="to-foo">
            <default-shape-ref name="default"/>
            <site-shape name="default"/>
          </binding-site>
          <mod-site name="phos-site-1">
            <default-mod-ref name="none"/>
          </mod-site>
          <mod-site name="phos-site-2">
            <default-mod-ref name="none"/>
          </mod-site>
          <mod-site name="phos-site-3">
            <default-mod-ref name="none"/>
          </mod-site>
        </mod-mol>
      </mols>
    </units-states>
    <explicit-species-tags>
      <explicit-species-tag name="ADP" tag="0x8059a9c"/>

          </mol-instance>
        </plex>

    <tagged-dump-streams>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="singletons.dmp" dump-period="0.01">
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="singleton-total"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="singleton-no-phos"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="singleton-1-only-phos"/>

        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="singleton-3-phos"/>
      </tagged-dump-stream>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="complexes.dmp" dump-period="0.01">
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="complex-total"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="complex-no-phos"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="complex-1-only-phos"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="complex-2-only-phos"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="complex-1-2-phos"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="complex-3-phos"/>
      </tagged-dump-stream>

        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="ATP"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="ADP"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="phosphate"/>
      </tagged-dump-stream>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="stats" dump-period="0.01"/>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="kinase.dmp" dump-period="0.01">
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="kinase-total"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="kinase-atp-bound"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="kinase-adp-bound"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="kinase-axp-free"/>
      </tagged-dump-stream>
    </tagged-dump-streams>
  </streams>
</moleculizer-state>
